summary: Tested admin user-management actions + activity feed regression. Backend: 7/8 pytest passed (give-btc, reset-user, delete-user, activity/recent, admin/users field shape, auth-gating). One minor backend issue: GET /api/admin/users returns 500 (instead of 403) for non-admin tokens because endpoint lacks `except HTTPException: raise` and falls into broad Exception->500. Frontend: Admin login renders Admin Panel with 'Wallet Approvals' + 'User Management' sections and +BTC/Reset/Delete buttons + search box (no crash). Test user login reaches Dashboard, activity feed ticker shows live items ('User D*** B*** has successfully rented a 20TH/s miner!') and remains stable over 30s with no page errors / red screen — useRef-based scheduler cleanup works as intended. Noted recurring (non-fatal) RN-Web warning 'Unexpected text node: )}. A text node cannot be a child of a <View>' originating from premium-mining-app.tsx; spammy but doesn't crash the app.

minor.issue: Non-admin authenticated user gets 500 instead of 403. The endpoint's `except Exception` block swallows the HTTPException(403) raised by `is_admin` check and re-raises as 500. Add `except HTTPException: raise` before the broad `except Exception` (server.py ~3996). Same pattern is correctly applied in reset-user/delete-user/give-btc.
No-token requests return 403 (FastAPI default for missing Bearer) rather than 401 — acceptable but worth noting if spec expects 401.

ui_bugs.issue: Recurring console error 'Unexpected text node: )}. A text node cannot be a child of a <View>.' emitted on render. Non-fatal but indicates a stray literal/whitespace child inside a <View>. Reference: /app/frontend/app/premium-mining-app.tsx (couldn't isolate exact line via grep; appears tied to conditional rendering near AdminPanel/Dashboard).

No `testID` props anywhere in premium-mining-app.tsx (buttons, inputs, modals). Tests must rely on placeholder/text selectors. Add testID to: email-input, password-input, sign-in-button, give-btc-button, reset-user-button, delete-user-button, give-btc-modal, give-btc-amount-input, give-btc-confirm, admin-panel.

issues: Success modal ('Welcome back to Koala Mining!') overlays the Admin Panel on first render — admin must dismiss it to interact with +BTC/Reset/Delete. Consider auto-dismiss after 1.5s or suppress on admin path.

react_native_issues.issue: shadow*/textShadow* style props deprecated (use boxShadow/textShadow); props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents). Multiple occurrences across premium-mining-app.tsx. Non-blocking but should be migrated for RN 0.74+/RN-Web compatibility.
Console warning '[expo-notifications] Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web' — expected on web preview, ignore.

action_items: Fix GET /api/admin/users to re-raise HTTPException before the broad except (add `except HTTPException: raise`) so non-admin gets 403 instead of 500. server.py ~3996.

Hunt down the stray ')}' text node in premium-mining-app.tsx that produces the recurring 'Unexpected text node' warning (likely a misplaced fragment closer or whitespace between sibling expressions inside a <View>).
Add testID props to admin panel buttons (give-btc, reset, delete), modal inputs and auth fields to enable robust automated testing.
Consider skipping the 'Welcome back' success alert on admin path, or auto-dismiss it, since it overlays the Admin Panel immediately after login.
critical_code_review_comments: premium-mining-app.tsx is 4841 lines — should be split (AdminPanel, AuthScreen, Dashboard, Modals each into own files).
Admin role detected purely by hardcoded email string in 2+ places (auth load + checkAuthStatus). Move to backend-issued role flag on /api/auth/me response to avoid client-side bypass.
Backend admin endpoints duplicate the same `find by str id then ObjectId` block ~4 times — extract a helper `resolve_user(user_id)`.
/api/admin/configure-payments still uses `admin@example.com` as admin check (server.py ~4271) — inconsistent with the rest of the admin endpoints which use is_admin().
seed_data_creation: Throwaway user (TEST_throwaway_<uuid>@example.com) is created and deleted by test_delete_throwaway_user; cleans up after itself.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_admin_actions.py covers admin actions + activity feed. Login responses use `access_token`. User _id is UUID string. To test delete-user, ALWAYS register a throwaway user via POST /api/auth/register and delete THAT one, never the admin or koalatest@example.com. The success alert overlays content right after login — dismiss it before interacting with admin panel buttons.
rca_of_issue: Activity-feed crash (previous iteration): caused by a self-rescheduling setTimeout without cleanup -> leaked timers + setState after unmount. Current implementation uses useRef-based scheduler with `activityMountedRef` guard and cleanup in useEffect return — verified stable across 30s window. Reset/factory-reset 500s (previous iteration): caused by `await` on synchronous pymongo calls + writing to `balance` instead of canonical `bitcoin_balance`. Verified fixed: reset-user now returns 200 and admin/users `balance` reflects bitcoin_balance=0 after reset.
